validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh to apply PR changes correctly. Main issues: 1) Used git apply which failed due to line offset mismatch in package.json. Fixed by using patch --fuzz=3. 2) Added pnpm format step to ensure new files pass format check. 3) Used proper template literals without escaping in heredocs. All 11 tests now pass (6 pass-to-pass + 5 fail-to-pass).

p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 5 repo CI/CD pass_to_pass tests: test_repo_lint (pnpm lint), test_repo_typecheck (pnpm typecheck), test_repo_changes_validate (pnpm changes:validate), test_repo_format_check (pnpm format:check), test_repo_build (pnpm build). Docker build successful with 'pnpm install --frozen-lockfile' added. All 5 p2p tests pass on base commit. 5 fail_to_pass tests correctly fail (PR not applied).
